title: elaeocarpus stipularis var. siamensis
intro: Elaeocarpus stipularis var. siamensis, also known as the Thai blue angel or Siamese blue tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, Elaeocarpus stipularis var. siamensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies for various ailments.
